name: Carrot Tzimmes
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium russet or Idaho potatoes, peeled and cubed
3 Yams or sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook, stirring often, for approximately 1 hour.
4. If the tzimmes starts to get dry, add up to 1/2 cup of water at a time.
5. Continue cooking until the carrots are very soft but not mushy.
6. The consistency should be moist and thick.
